title: 15cm White Advent Candle with Stars Christmas Cone shaped Countdown 4054
features: Advent Candles are a wonderful way to celebrate the festive season.
With numbers 1-24 and mini star detail. Simply light the candle and allow it to burn down to the next number each day.
The numbers will help you count down the days 'til Christmas Day.
description: Product description 15cm Cone Christmas Advent Countdown Candle Advent Candles are a wonderful way to celebrate the festive season. Christmas Advent Candle. Cone shape. With numbers 1-24 and mini star detail. Simply light the candle and allow it to burn down to the next number each day. The numbers will help you count down the days 'til Christmas Day. Size Approx: 15cm. Safety Warning Always use indoors. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Keep away from flammable materials. Do not burn the candle for more than 4 hours at a time. Always extinguish the candle when it reaches the number 24 or when it burns down to 2.5 cm from the base.
